executive_summary.ai_narrative: SENTINEL APEX AI Engine analyzed 136 intelligence items from 74 live feeds. Threat posture: HIGH (Global Risk Index: 92.9/100). 21 CRITICAL + 21 HIGH severity advisories active. 22 KEV-confirmed exploits actively targeted in the wild. Anomaly Engine detected 15 behavioral deviations — 8 zero-day candidates identified. Campaign Engine mapped 20 active threat actor clusters. Predictive Engine flags Mobile as highest-risk sector (88.3% exploit probability, 30-day horizon). Immediate action required on KEV-listed CVEs and supply chain attack vectors.
